text: The Bug Arena floor has been absolutely ELECTRIC this week! The action was nonstop, starting with Eight-Eye Static once again proving his might, dispatching Sir Stinks-a-Lot in a brutal showdown! Meanwhile, Dustwing Hex kept the Hex-Matter flow going, and Lucky Seven claimed another victory, capping off a night of pure insect adrenaline. But the real story? The arrival of fresh, terrifying talent! We welcomed five new contenders, including the beastly Obsidian Predator and the formidable Scarred Reaper. The ranks just got deeper! On the hype front, Apex Phantom and Ember Drake have secured the #1 Contender plaques, signaling monumental battles ahead. With new blood like Grim Stalker entering the mix and the predatory prowess of the Obsidian Predator earning 'Strong Collector'
